qids.subject: Databases
qids.prose: Which of the following query transformations (i.e., replacing the l.h.s. expression by the r.h.s expression) is incorrect? R1 and R2 are relations, C1 and C2 are selection conditions and A1 and A2 are attributes of R1. A. B. C. D.

qids.subject: Databases
qids.prose: The relational algebra expression equivalent to the following tuple calculus expression: is A. B. C. D.

qids.subject: Databases
qids.prose: Which of the following relational calculus expression is not safe? A. B. C. D.
